MEMORANDUM RAHASIA — Project Garuda

Internal acquisition memo prepared by Dr Budi Santoso (NIK 3174050101900012)
for the board of PT Cendana Investama.

The proposed acquisition of PT Mawar Sejahtera Tbk for IDR 2.4 trillion is currently
non-public and subject to OJK disclosure rules. Closing Date targeted Q4 2026.

Contact: budi.santoso@cendana.id
